steps.title: Track the passage focus
steps.content: The passage begins with the Marsalis family's nickname and then lists the accomplishments of several family members. Those details explain why the family earned that nickname.

steps.title: Separate purpose from detail
steps.content: B suggests comparison, but the passage does not compare the musicians against one another. C treats Wynton's Pulitzer as the main point, though it is only one example. D introduces collaboration, which is not discussed. The text explains the nickname. The answer is A.
